seo.title: Building Content Generation with Agno + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build content generation with Agno + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building content generation agents with Agno enables powerful LLM-driven creation pipelines that handle multi-modal inputs and complex workflows. However, without proper guardrails, these agents risk producing brand-inconsistent content, factual errors, or plagiarized material that damages reputation. Vex provides essential verification to ensure every output meets brand voice, factual accuracy, and editorial standards.

architectureOverview.heading: Content Generation Architecture with Agno
architectureOverview.description:
Agno agents orchestrate content creation through a pipeline of specialized sub-agents: a research agent gathers facts, a writer agent generates drafts in brand voice, an editor agent enforces tone and structure, and a fact-checker validates claims. Multi-modal inputs like brand style guides (images/PDFs) and reference materials feed into the system, with session memory maintaining context across iterations. The final output passes structured validation before publication, ensuring SEO compliance and originality.

The architecture leverages Agno's agent.run() for sequential execution, with tools for web search, image analysis, and structured output parsing. Vex verification wraps critical steps to catch hallucinations, tone drift, and factual inconsistencies in real-time. This creates a reliable content factory that scales from blog posts to marketing campaigns.

risks.name: Brand Voice Drift
risks.description: Agent generates content deviating from established brand tone, vocabulary, or style guidelines
risks.mitigation: Vex brand consistency checks against style guide embeddings at each generation step

risks.name: Factual Hallucinations
risks.description: LLM fabricates statistics, quotes, or events during content creation
risks.mitigation: Real-time fact-checking with Vex against verified sources and web search results

risks.name: Plagiarism Risk
risks.description: Agent reproduces existing content instead of creating original material
risks.mitigation: Vex originality scoring with semantic similarity detection against web corpus

risks.name: SEO Non-Compliance
risks.description: Generated content fails keyword density, readability, or structure requirements
risks.mitigation: Structured output validation with Vex ensuring SEO schema adherence

implementation.title: Basic Agno Content Agent Setup
implementation.description: Create a foundational content generation agent with research and writing capabilities
implementation.code:
from agno.agent import Agent
from agno.tools import DuckDuckGoSearch

content_agent = Agent(
    name="ContentCreator",
    model="gpt-4o",
    tools=[DuckDuckGoSearch()],
    instructions="""You are a professional content writer. 
    Always research thoroughly before writing. 
    Structure content with H2/H3 headings and bullet points.""",
    show_tool_calls=True
)

result = content_agent.run("Write a 800-word blog post about sustainable fashion trends in 2024")
print(result.content)

implementation.title: Multi-Modal Brand Voice Integration
implementation.description: Incorporate brand style guide (PDF/image) analysis for consistent voice enforcement
implementation.code:
from agno.agent import Agent
from agno.tools import PDFReader, ImageAnalyzer

brand_agent = Agent(
    name="BrandVoiceEnforcer",
    model="gpt-4o",
    tools=[PDFReader(), ImageAnalyzer()],
    instructions="Analyze brand style guide and extract: tone, vocabulary, sentence length, voice patterns"
)

# Analyze brand assets
brand_analysis = brand_agent.run("Analyze this brand style guide: styleguide.pdf")

content_agent = Agent(
    name="BrandContentWriter",
    model="gpt-4o",
    instructions=f"Write using exactly this brand voice: {brand_analysis.content}"
)

implementation.title: Structured Content Output Schema
implementation.description: Enforce SEO-optimized structure with validated JSON output
implementation.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List

class BlogPost(BaseModel):
    title: str = Field(..., description="SEO-optimized title <60 chars")
    meta_description: str = Field(..., max_length=160)
    h2_headings: List[str] = Field(..., min_items=3)
    word_count: int = Field(..., ge=800)
    keywords: List[str] = Field(..., min_items=5)

content_agent = Agent(
    name="StructuredWriter",
    model="gpt-4o",
    output_type=BlogPost,
    instructions="Always return valid JSON matching BlogPost schema"
)

post = content_agent.run("Sustainable fashion 2024", stream=True)
print(post.title, post.word_count)

implementation.title: Fact-Checking Pipeline
implementation.description: Separate verification agent validates claims against sources

vexIntegration.title: Brand Consistency Verification Decorator
vexIntegration.description: Wrap agent execution with Vex brand voice validation

vexIntegration.title: Factual Accuracy Guardrail
vexIntegration.description: Real-time fact-checking with source citation verification
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import verify

@verify(checks=["factual_accuracy"], sources=["web_search", "wikipedia"])
def create_research_content(topic: str):
    """Vex cross-references all claims against live sources"""
    research = research_agent.run(f"Research {topic}")
    content = writer_agent.run(f"Write article using: {research.content}")
    return content

# Automatically fails if hallucinations detected
article = create_research_content("quantum computing breakthroughs 2024")

# Vex metadata includes verification score
print(f"Truth score: {article.metadata['vex_score']:.2f}")

vexIntegration.title: SEO & Originality Pipeline
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import verify
from agno.agent import Agent

@verify(
    checks=[
        "seo_compliance", 
        "originality", 
        "structured_output"
    ],
    schema=BlogPost
)
def publish_ready_content(topic: str):
    """Full production pipeline with Vex safety net"""
    raw_content = content_agent.run(topic)
    edited = editor_agent.run(f"Polish for SEO: {raw_content.content}")
    return edited

# Single call handles entire pipeline safely
final_post = publish_ready_content("best CRM software 2024")

# Vex approval required for publication
if final_post.metadata['vex_approved']:
    print("✅ Ready for CMS publishing")
else:
    print("❌ Needs human review")
